---
name: Feature (course branch: NN-feature-short-name)
about: New functionality developed on a branch other than main (DevOps rubric)
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
<!-- What should this feature do? -->

## Acceptance criteria
- [ ] Works locally (server + client)
- [ ] Unit tests added/updated if applicable

## Branch naming (rubric)
Create a branch from `main` using the **issue number** as a prefix, for example:
`12-feature-short-description`

## PR
Open a Pull Request into `main` and in the description use a **closing keyword**, e.g. `Closes #12`.
